Home › Villanova, PA

Lifestyle Medicine Near Villanova, PA

About Villanova, PA

Villanova is a prestigious Main Line community adjacent to Wayne, home to Villanova University and a health-conscious residential population. Many Villanova residents are athletes, academics, and professionals who understand the evidence behind lifestyle and long-term health — and want a physician who does too.

Prevention-First Medicine Just 1 Mile Away

Forward Family Medicine integrates evidence-based lifestyle medicine into every DPC membership — nutrition, physical activity, sleep, and stress as clinical tools. For Villanova patients, the practice is literally next door.

What is lifestyle medicine? →

Why Villanova Patients Choose This Approach

  • Evidence-based nutrition, activity, and sleep counseling — built into your care
  • Chronic disease prevention and management with a lifestyle-first approach
  • Personalized plans — not generic advice
  • Included in membership at no extra cost

Services Included

Full lifestyle medicine counseling · Preventive care · Chronic disease management · Unlimited visits · Wholesale labs Full services →

Practical Information

Distance: ~1 mile from Villanova SEPTA: One stop from Villanova Station Telehealth: Video consultations included and well-suited to lifestyle coaching

Frequently Asked Questions

Is lifestyle medicine available near Villanova, PA? Yes — Forward Family Medicine in Wayne is 1 mile from Villanova and includes lifestyle medicine in every membership.

Is this covered in the membership fee? Yes — all lifestyle medicine counseling is included. See membership →

Can I do lifestyle medicine consultations by video? Absolutely. Telehealth is included and works very well for nutrition and lifestyle coaching conversations.

Take the First Step

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
